name: Automotive Dealership
description: Premium pre-owned / luxury dealership template — cinematic hero with test-drive form, stats, 6-card inventory grid with make/model/year/mileage/engine/price, authorized-brands strip, 4-step buy process, 3 featured vehicles, 3-tier financing plans, testimonials, test-drive booking form, contact, and footer. Tuned for luxury and performance dealerships.

meta_description.label: Meta Description
meta_description.default: Apex Motors — Dubai's premier destination for certified pre-owned luxury and performance vehicles. BMW, Mercedes, Porsche, and more.

hero_subtitle.label: Hero Subtitle
hero_subtitle.default: Hand-selected European luxury and performance vehicles. Every car is fully inspected, certified, and backed by a two-year warranty. Delivered anywhere in the UAE.

hero_form_sub.label: Form Sub
hero_form_sub.default: Leave your details and one of our vehicle specialists will call you back within 30 minutes during showroom hours.

hero_form_note.label: Form Note
hero_form_note.default: We'll never share your details. No sales pressure — guaranteed.

inventory_intro.label: Inventory Intro
inventory_intro.default: Hand-picked, independently inspected, and ready to drive. Every vehicle below is available for a test drive today — no appointment needed until 6pm.

process_intro.label: Process Intro
process_intro.default: No games, no pushy sales. Here's exactly what happens from the moment you walk in to the moment you drive out.

step_1_text.label: Step 1 Text
step_1_text.default: View our full inventory online or at the showroom. Every car comes with a complete history report and inspection file.

step_2_text.label: Step 2 Text
step_2_text.default: Book a 30-minute test drive — any car, any time during showroom hours. A specialist will walk you through every feature.

step_3_text.label: Step 3 Text
step_3_text.default: We arrange finance with seven major UAE banks in-house. Pre-approval in 60 minutes, paperwork done same day.

step_4_text.label: Step 4 Text
step_4_text.default: Full valet, documented RTA registration, and keys handed over. Free home delivery anywhere in the UAE.

featured_intro.label: Featured Intro
featured_intro.default: Three vehicles hand-selected by our lead specialist this week for their rarity, condition, and value.

featured_1_desc.label: Featured 1 Desc
featured_1_desc.default: 2022 model, only 6,400 km. Full Porsche service history. Panoramic glass roof, 21-inch Mission E Design wheels, and full factory warranty remaining.

featured_2_desc.label: Featured 2 Desc
featured_2_desc.default: 2023, 4,800 km. Rosso Corsa over tan leather. Matrix LED, carbon interior trim, and Scuderia shields. Ferrari Approved warranty included.

featured_3_desc.label: Featured 3 Desc
featured_3_desc.default: 2022 W12 First Edition. Mulliner Driving Spec, night vision, rotating display. One of only 12 in the region. Full Bentley service.

financing_intro.label: Financing Intro
financing_intro.default: Partnered with seven UAE banks for competitive rates. Pre-approval in under an hour. Flexible terms from 12 to 60 months.

plan_1_desc.label: Plan 1 Desc
plan_1_desc.default: Our most popular plan. Competitive rates with 20% down payment.

plan_2_desc.label: Plan 2 Desc
plan_2_desc.default: Lower monthly payments via balloon-payment structure. Most flexible.

plan_3_desc.label: Plan 3 Desc
plan_3_desc.default: For UAE residents who want flexibility without long-term commitment.

plan_3_feature_4.label: Plan 3 F4
plan_3_feature_4.default: Purchase option at end of lease

testimonial_1_quote.label: Testimonial 1 Quote
testimonial_1_quote.default: Picked up my M4 from Apex last month. Full transparency on the service history, no pressure, and the finance team got me pre-approved in 45 minutes. First time I've actually enjoyed car buying.

testimonial_2_quote.label: Testimonial 2 Quote
testimonial_2_quote.default: Third car I've bought from Apex. The inspection standards are legitimately different from the rest of the market. I tell everyone who asks.

testimonial_3_quote.label: Testimonial 3 Quote
testimonial_3_quote.default: Delivered the Porsche straight to my compound in Abu Dhabi, fully registered, detailed, with the paperwork sorted. Zero hassle. That's the Apex experience.

booking_intro.label: Booking Intro
booking_intro.default: Drive any vehicle in our inventory. Sessions run 30 minutes and include a walkthrough of the car's features and history with a specialist. No commitment, no pressure.

contact_intro.label: Contact Intro
contact_intro.default: Our Sheikh Zayed Road showroom houses 45+ vehicles on permanent display. Walk in anytime during opening hours — coffee's on us.

contact_address.label: Address
contact_address.default: Sheikh Zayed Road, Al Quoz, Dubai, UAE

contact_cta_text.label: Contact CTA Text
contact_cta_text.default: Book a test drive slot and get behind the wheel of any vehicle in our showroom. Zero obligation.

footer_tagline.label: Footer Tagline
footer_tagline.default: Dubai's premier destination for certified pre-owned luxury and performance vehicles. Hand-selected. Fully inspected. Warranty backed.

blog_intro.label: Blog Intro
blog_intro.default: Tips, news and insights from our team.

blog_post_1_title.label: Post 1 Title
blog_post_1_title.default: What to expect at your first visit

blog_post_1_excerpt.label: Post 1 Excerpt
blog_post_1_excerpt.default: A short walk-through of the first visit so you know exactly what to expect.

blog_post_2_excerpt.label: Post 2 Excerpt
blog_post_2_excerpt.default: The questions that should be standard but rarely are.

blog_post_3_title.label: Post 3 Title
blog_post_3_title.default: The case for taking your time

blog_post_3_excerpt.label: Post 3 Excerpt
blog_post_3_excerpt.default: Why patience and care isn't a luxury — it's the bare minimum.
